# Miami Alliance 3PL — Complete Business Reference

> Miami Alliance 3PL is a third-party logistics (3PL) and fulfillment company headquartered at 8780 NW 100th ST, Medley, FL 33178. We specialize in gaming and electronics fulfillment, e-commerce order fulfillment, Amazon FBA prep, warehousing, and Latin American distribution. $1,000/month minimum spend, same-day shipping, 99.8% order accuracy. Phone: (786) 873-8819. Email: contact@miamialliance3pl.com. Website: https://miamialliance3pl.com

---

## Company Overview

Miami Alliance 3PL is a full-service third-party logistics provider based in Medley, Florida, serving e-commerce brands, Amazon sellers, gaming companies, electronics distributors, and international traders. Founded by logistics professionals with 15+ years of supply chain experience, Miami Alliance operates from two strategic warehouse locations: a 20,000+ sq ft climate-controlled facility in Medley, FL (Miami-Dade County) and a Gulf Coast hub in Biloxi, MS.

### Why Miami Alliance 3PL

- **Location advantage**: 8 miles from Miami International Airport (MIA), minutes from Port Miami and Port Everglades — the gateway to Latin America and the Caribbean
- **Gaming & electronics specialization**: The #1 fulfillment center for gaming and electronics brands in the U.S. with ESD-safe handling, serialized inventory tracking, and climate-controlled storage
- **Same-day shipping**: All orders received by 2PM EST ship the same day
- **99.8% order accuracy**: Barcode scanning at every stage, photo verification for high-value items, systematic quality checks
- **80% U.S. coverage in 2 days**: Ground shipping reaches 80% of U.S. customers within 2 business days
- **Bilingual team**: English and Spanish fluency for seamless LATAM operations
- **No long-term contracts**: Month-to-month service, pay only for what you use
- **4.9/5 star rating**: Based on 47 verified client reviews

### Team

- **Jorge Da Silva** — Director of Operations. 15+ years in logistics, warehousing, and international trade. Expert in Latin American distribution, gaming product handling, and warehouse management systems.

---

## Core Services

### 1. Warehousing & Storage
Full-service warehousing in a climate-controlled, 24/7-monitored facility. Pallet storage at $0.75/pallet/day. Box storage at $0.025/cubic foot/day. Dedicated zones for high-value electronics with ESD-safe protocols. Real-time inventory tracking via customer portal.

### 2. E-Commerce Fulfillment (Pick, Pack, Ship)
Same-day order processing for all major e-commerce platforms. Integrates with Shopify, Amazon, WooCommerce, eBay, TikTok Shop, and Mercado Libre. Pricing:
- Envelope: $1.50/order
- Small Box: $3.00/order
- Medium Box: $5.00/order
- Large Box: $20.00/order

### 3. Amazon FBA Prep
Comprehensive Amazon seller services:
- FNSKU Labeling: $0.30/unit
- Poly Bagging: $0.50/unit
- Bubble Wrapping: $1.00/unit
- Bundling & Kitting: $2.00/bundle
- Box Content Labeling: $3.00/box
- Inspection & QC: $0.15/unit
Also supports FBM (Fulfilled by Merchant) with same-day shipping.

### 4. Gaming & Electronics Fulfillment
The #1 fulfillment center for gaming brands in the U.S. Handles:
- Consoles: Nintendo Switch, PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X
- Video games (physical media)
- Gaming peripherals and accessories
- Consumer electronics
Features: ESD-safe handling zones, serialized inventory tracking (every unit tracked by serial number), climate-controlled storage, photo documentation before shipping, insured storage, 24/7 high-security zones.

### 5. Dropshipping Fulfillment
Blind shipping (no sender branding), branded packaging options, no-minimum dropship fulfillment with same-day processing from Miami.

### 6. TikTok Shop Fulfillment
TikTok Shop integration for social commerce brands. Influencer product shipping, viral product fulfillment, and rapid scaling support.

### 7. Wholesale & B2B Distribution
Case-pack distribution, retailer compliance (UPC, EDI), and B2B order processing for wholesale brands.

### 8. Latin America Distribution
Cross-border fulfillment to Latin America and Caribbean markets. Miami is the #1 gateway for LATAM trade. Import receiving, export preparation, customs broker coordination, and international freight management.

### 9. Mercado Libre Fulfillment
Ship from USA to Mercado Libre marketplaces across Latin America. Product prep, labeling, export documentation, and marketplace compliance.

### 10. TWIC Port Pickup & Delivery
TWIC-credentialed, TSA-vetted team supports secure pickup and drop-off inside PortMiami and Port Everglades. Warehouse receiving, staging, and outbound coordination from Medley, FL.

### 11. Receiving & Quality Control
Same-day receiving with barcode scanning, quality inspection, damage reporting, and instant inventory updates. Receiving & Intake: $15.00/pallet.

### 12. Returns & Reverse Logistics
Full returns management: receiving returned items, quality inspection and grading, restocking sellable inventory, disposing of damaged goods. Processing within 24-48 hours.

### 13. Black Wrapping
Specialty pallet wrapping with opaque black stretch film for high-value or sensitive products. $7.00/pallet.

### 14. Kitting & Assembly
Custom bundling, kitting, subscription box assembly, and product preparation services.

### 15. 3PL for Brands
DTC and e-commerce brand fulfillment with branded packaging, custom inserts, and multi-channel support.

### 16. 3PL for Factories & Manufacturers
Manufacturer distribution, B2B warehousing, and shipping services for factories.

---

## Complete Pricing

| Service | Price | Unit |
|---------|-------|------|
| Box Storage | $0.025 | per cubic foot per day |
| Pallet Storage | $0.75 | per pallet per day |
| Pick & Pack (Envelope) | $1.50 | per order |
| Pick & Pack (Small Box) | $3.00 | per order |
| Pick & Pack (Medium Box) | $5.00 | per order |
| Pick & Pack (Large Box) | $20.00 | per order |
| FNSKU Labeling | $0.30 | per unit |
| Poly Bagging | $0.50 | per unit |
| Bubble Wrapping | $1.00 | per unit |
| Bundling & Kitting | $2.00 | per bundle |
| Box Content Labeling | $3.00 | per box |
| Inspection & QC | $0.15 | per unit |
| Black Wrapping | $7.00 | per pallet |
| Receiving & Intake | $15.00 | per pallet |
| Local Pickup/Delivery (1 pallet) | $120.00 | starting price |
| Additional Pallets (pickup/delivery) | $30.00 | per pallet (up to 8) |

**Minimum spend**: $1,000/month. No long-term contracts. No minimum order count.

---

## Warehouse Locations

### Miami Warehouse (Primary)
- **Address**: 8780 NW 100th ST, Medley, FL 33178
- **Size**: 20,000+ square feet, climate-controlled
- **Hours**: Monday-Friday 8AM-6PM EST, Saturday 9AM-2PM EST
- **Security**: 24/7 monitoring and surveillance
- **Features**: ESD-safe handling zones, serialized inventory tracking, barcode scanning, loading docks, climate control
- **Proximity**: 8 miles from Miami International Airport (MIA), 15 minutes from Port Miami, 20 minutes from Port Everglades
- **Ideal for**: Latin American trade, international imports/exports, gaming/electronics, e-commerce fulfillment

### Biloxi Warehouse (Gulf Coast Hub)
- **Address**: 1606 Beach Blvd, Biloxi, MS 39531
- **Features**: Cost-effective Southeast U.S. distribution, direct I-10 corridor access, near Port of Gulfport
- **Ideal for**: Southeast U.S. distribution, overflow storage, cost-sensitive inventory

---

## Frequently Asked Questions

### What is a 3PL and how does it work?
A 3PL (Third-Party Logistics) provider like Miami Alliance 3PL handles your warehousing, fulfillment, and shipping operations so you can focus on growing your business. You ship your inventory to our warehouse, and we store it, pick & pack orders, and ship them to your customers on your behalf.

### How fast does Miami Alliance 3PL ship orders?
Miami Alliance 3PL ships same-day for all orders received by 2PM EST. From our Miami warehouse, 80% of U.S. customers receive their orders within 2 business days via ground shipping. Express and next-day options are also available.

### What makes Miami Alliance the best Miami 3PL?
Miami Alliance 3PL combines a strategic Medley, FL location (8 miles from MIA, minutes from Port Miami), 99.8% order accuracy, same-day fulfillment, and transparent pricing. We're rated 4.9 stars by our clients and integrate with Shopify, Amazon, WooCommerce, and all major e-commerce platforms.

### How much does 3PL fulfillment cost in Miami?
Miami Alliance 3PL pricing is transparent with no hidden fees. Storage starts at $0.025 per cubic foot per day for boxes and $0.75 per pallet per day. Pick and pack ranges from $1.50 (envelope) to $20.00 (large box) per order. Amazon FBA prep starts at $0.15 per unit for inspection. $1,000/month minimum spend.

### Do you offer Amazon FBA prep services?
Yes. Miami Alliance 3PL provides comprehensive Amazon FBA prep including FNSKU labeling ($0.30/unit), poly bagging ($0.50/unit), bubble wrapping ($1.00/unit), bundling and kitting ($2.00/bundle), box content labeling ($3.00/box), and inspection and QC ($0.15/unit). We also support FBM fulfillment with same-day shipping.

### Can you handle international shipping to Latin America?
Absolutely. Miami Alliance 3PL is the gateway to Latin America and the Caribbean. Located 8 miles from Miami International Airport and minutes from Port Miami, we handle import receiving, export preparation, customs broker coordination, and cross-border fulfillment to all Latin American and Caribbean markets.

### Do you specialize in gaming and electronics fulfillment?
Yes. Miami Alliance 3PL is the #1 fulfillment center for gaming and electronics brands in the U.S. We handle consoles (Nintendo, PlayStation, Xbox), video games, peripherals, and consumer electronics with ESD-safe protocols, serialized inventory tracking, climate-controlled storage, and 24/7 high-security zones.

### Can you pick up inside PortMiami and Port Everglades?
Yes. Miami Alliance 3PL supports secure pickup and drop-off inside PortMiami and Port Everglades with TWIC-credentialed, TSA-vetted access plus warehouse receiving, staging, and next-step coordination from Medley, FL.

### Do you handle returns and reverse logistics?
Yes. Miami Alliance 3PL manages the full returns cycle: receiving returned items, quality inspection and grading, restocking sellable inventory, and disposing of damaged goods. We process returns within 24-48 hours.

### Can you fulfill FDA-regulated products?
Yes. Miami Alliance 3PL handles supplements, beauty products, food items, and other regulated goods with lot tracking, expiration date management, and FIFO (first-in, first-out) inventory rotation. Our warehouse meets storage requirements for FDA-compliant products.

### What e-commerce platforms do you integrate with?
Miami Alliance 3PL integrates with Shopify, Amazon (FBA and FBM), WooCommerce, eBay, TikTok Shop, and Mercado Libre. Orders sync automatically, and tracking updates are pushed directly to your customers.

### How does 3PL onboarding work?
Onboarding with Miami Alliance 3PL typically takes 1-2 weeks: account setup, SKU catalog configuration, receiving your first inventory shipment, and completing a test order cycle. We assign a dedicated onboarding specialist to guide you through the process.

### What is your order accuracy rate?
Miami Alliance 3PL maintains a 99.8% order accuracy rate across all fulfillment operations through barcode scanning at every stage, photo verification for high-value items, systematic quality checks before shipping, and serialized inventory tracking for electronics.

### What is black wrapping?
Black wrapping is a specialty service where Miami Alliance 3PL wraps your pallets in opaque black stretch film instead of clear wrap. This provides an extra layer of security and discretion for high-value or sensitive products. The service costs $7 per pallet.

### How is storage pricing calculated?
Storage at Miami Alliance 3PL is calculated based on package type: boxes are charged at $0.025 per cubic foot per day, and pallets at $0.75 per pallet per day. Use our free Instant Quote Calculator at miamialliance3pl.com/quote.html for exact pricing.

### Do you have minimum requirements?
Miami Alliance 3PL has a $1,000 monthly minimum spend. No minimum order count and no long-term contracts. Whether you ship 10 orders or 10,000 per month, we scale with your business.

### How does a Miami 3PL compare to a West Coast fulfillment center?
Miami offers significant advantages over West Coast fulfillment: lower warehouse costs than LA or SF, direct access to Latin American markets, proximity to Port Miami and MIA for imports, and 2-day ground shipping to the entire East Coast and Southeast. Many brands are moving fulfillment from California to Miami to cut costs and expand into LATAM markets.

### What technology do you use?
Miami Alliance 3PL uses a custom-built Warehouse Management System (WMS) accessible through our Customer Portal. Features include real-time inventory tracking, barcode/SKU scanning, automated low-stock alerts, shipment tracking, billing dashboard, and analytics reporting. The portal is accessible 24/7 from any device.

## Industry Specializations

- Gaming consoles and video games (Nintendo, PlayStation, Xbox)
- Consumer electronics and peripherals
- Amazon FBA and FBM sellers

- Supplements, beauty, and FDA-regulated products
- Latin American and Caribbean distribution
- Mercado Libre marketplace sellers
- Dropshipping businesses
- Wholesale and B2B distribution
- Nicotine pouches and consumer packaged goods
